name: Real Estate Photo Scraper
tagline: Download every photo from any home listing in one click.
description: No more saving images one by one. Paste a listing URL from Redfin, Zillow, Compass, or any major real estate site and this skill downloads every photo instantly into a folder on your computer.
whoFor: Home buyers, investors, and agents who spend too much time manually saving listing photos when comparing properties or building reports.
howItWorks: Paste a listing URL into Claude and the skill takes over — opening the listing in your browser, navigating through every photo in the gallery, and saving them all to a folder. You get every image without touching a single save button.
requirements: Claude desktop app with Cowork mode enabled, plus the Claude in Chrome extension installed and active in your Chrome browser.
